title: neotrewia cumingii
intro: Neotrewia cumingii, also known as the tigers' eye, is a type of rhizomatous aquatic plant belonging to the family Haloragaceae. Traditionally, Neotrewia cumingii is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and improving wound healing. Neotrewia cumingii is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties.
